caption: A man with dark skin wearing a large, grey, peaked wig, glasses, and a white dress shirt with a red bowtie and suspenders is recorded in a studio setting. He wears black headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. The background features walls decorated with framed photos and clothing displays, including "LEE" branded merchandise. On-screen logos appear on both sides of the frame, including "STUDIO PODCAST" on the left and "OSS TALK JOY" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man is gesturing with his right hand near his ear and face, appearing to be speaking or reacting. His facial expression shifts slightly from a focused look to one of more intense expression as he continues to move his hand and speak. The overall composition remains static, focusing on the man from the chest up.
